response.overview: DJ, producer, and singer Leah Culver finds herself struggling to break into stardom, all while dealing with loss and the perpetual development of a female artist finding her voice and style in this new crap show of a music industry.
response.tagline: DJ, producer, and singer Leah Culver finds herself struggling to break into stardom, all while dealing with loss and the perpetual development of a female artist finding her voice and style in this new crap show of a music industry.
response.title: Leah Culver: Creating Light
